features.name: Historical Completed Feature Summary
features.description: Summarize completed AHE work from `feat-001` through `feat-042` so harness tracking stays compact while preserving the main milestones, dependency boundary, and verification history.
features.evidence: Represents the previously completed `feat-001` through `feat-042` history. The detailed tracker entries were intentionally compressed into this one record to reduce token usage after the AHE compression and routing work stabilized.

features.name: No-Backup Feature History Compression
features.description: Remove AHE workflow backup-copy guidance and define `ahe compress feature-list` to replace stale completed history with one summarized done feature.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/skills/ahe-init/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-harness/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-compress/SKILL.md`, `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `docs/product.md`, `feature-list.json`, `progress.md`, `session-handoff.md`, `tests/test_init_workflow.py`, `tests/test_ahe_hook.py`, and `tests/test_compression_workflow.py`. Verified with `./init.sh`, focused pytest for the updated contracts, `pytest tests/ -x`, `ruff check src/ tests/`, `bash -n bin/ahe`, `node --check .codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, and the compression detector.

features.name: Global AHE Skill Installation and Docs Read Contract
features.description: Make AHE install and run from the global Codex home, and update startup/harness guidance so every `docs/*.md` file is read as project context even when `AGENTS.md` does not name it directly.
features.evidence: Updated `bin/ahe`, `README.md`, `docs/product.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-init/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-harness/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-review/SKILL.md`, `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `package.json`, `tests/test_project_setup.py`, and `tests/test_init_workflow.py`. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pytest tests/test_project_setup.py tests/test_init_workflow.py tests/test_ahe_hook.py -x`, `pytest tests/ -x`, `ruff check src/ tests/`, `bash -n bin/ahe`, `node --check .codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `python3 -m json.tool package.json`, and `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`.

features.name: Lowercase Harness Artifact Filenames
features.description: Rename product, progress, and session handoff artifacts to lowercase filenames while keeping `AGENTS.md` uppercase, and update AHE contracts, templates, tests, and compression detection to use the lowercase names.
features.evidence: Renamed `docs/product.md`, `progress.md`, `session-handoff.md`, `.codex/ahe-shared/templates/product.md`, `.codex/ahe-shared/templates/progress.md`, and `.codex/ahe-shared/templates/session-handoff.md`; updated skill, hook, docs, tests, and detector references. Verified with `pytest tests/ -x`, `ruff check src/ tests/`, `bash -n bin/ahe`, `node --check .codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, `python3 -m json.tool package.json`, and `sh .codex/skills/ahe-compress/scripts/check-harness-size.sh`.

features.name: Independent AHE Ship Plan Export
features.description: Add `ahe-ship` as an independent shipped skill and route exact `ahe ship`, `ahe-ship`, and `$ahe-ship` to export the latest Codex Plan Mode plan into `.plans/{plan_name}.md` for another LLM platform.
features.evidence: Added `.codex/skills/ahe-ship/SKILL.md`, `agents/openai.yaml`, and `scripts/write_plan.py`; updated `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `bin/ahe`, `README.md`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and focused tests. Verified the feature with `pytest tests/test_ahe_ship_writer.py tests/test_ahe_hook.py -k 'ship or ahe_ship' -x`, `PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/ahe-ship-pycache python3 -m py_compile .codex/skills/ahe-ship/scripts/write_plan.py`, `node --check .codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `bash -n bin/ahe`, `ruff check src/ tests/`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, `python3 -m json.tool package.json`, and `./init.sh`. Broader command-set and full-suite verification now pass with the staged product-doc work present.

features.name: Staged Product Docs
features.description: Treat `docs/product.md` as the overview product spec and optional `docs/product1.md`, `docs/product2.md`, and later numeric files as ordered product stages.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `.codex/skills/ahe-init/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-harness/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-think/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-review/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-solve/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-compress/SKILL.md`, `.codex/skills/ahe-compress/scripts/check-harness-size.sh`, `docs/product.md`, and focused tests. The contract now derives features only from the active numeric product stage, keeps future stages as context, ignores non-numeric product docs for stage ordering, and advances only after current-stage feature-list items are `done`. Also aligned shared template filenames with the existing lowercase contract. Verified with focused staged-doc tests, `pytest tests/ -x`, `./init.sh`, `node --check .codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `bash -n bin/ahe`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, and the compression detector.

features.name: Independent AHE Fix Plan Export
features.description: Add `ahe-fix` as an independent user-facing skill and route exact `ahe fix`, `ahe-fix`, and `$ahe-fix` to create a concrete `.plans/{plan_name}.md` fix plan for errors or changed user intent.
features.evidence: Added `.codex/skills/ahe-fix/SKILL.md` and `.codex/skills/ahe-fix/scripts/write_fix_plan.py`; updated `.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `bin/ahe`, `README.md`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and focused tests. Verified with `pytest tests/ -x`, `ruff check src/ tests/`, `node --check .codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `bash -n bin/ahe`, `PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/ahe-fix-pycache python3 -m py_compile .codex/skills/ahe-fix/scripts/write_fix_plan.py`, `./init.sh`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, `python3 -m json.tool package.json`, `sh .codex/skills/ahe-compress/scripts/check-harness-size.sh`, hook smoke for `ahe fix`, and writer smoke to `/tmp/ahe-fix-smoke/.plans/fix-smoke.md`. `make check` is unavailable because no Makefile target exists; `mypy src/ --strict` is unavailable because `mypy` is not installed.

features.name: Rename ahe-init to ahe-new and expand staged tests
features.description: Rename the new-start workflow from ahe-init to ahe-new, replacing the old command contract and skill directory. Restructure tests into stages centered on test_ahe_new.py.
features.evidence: Renamed .codex/skills/ahe-init to ahe-new and updated its SKILL.md. Updated ahe-hook.js, bin/ahe, README.md, and docs/PRODUCT.md for the ahe-new contract. Renamed test_init_workflow.py to test_new_workflow.py and updated all relevant test files. Verified with pytest tests/ -x, bash -n bin/ahe, node --check .codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js, and ./init.sh.

features.name: AHE Ship Executes Saved Plans Through Antigravity
features.description: Update `ahe ship` so it writes `.plans/{plan_name}.md`, runs the saved plan through `ahe-antigravity execute` with `agy`, and removes the plan only after verified completion.
features.evidence: Updated `packages/ahe-antigravity/bin/ahe-antigravity`, `packages/ahe-antigravity/skills/execute/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/ship/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/harness/SKILL.md`, `README.md`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and the packaged-path tests including the new `tests/test_ahe_antigravity_execute.py`. Verified with `pytest tests/test_ahe_ship_writer.py tests/test_ahe_antigravity_execute.py tests/test_ahe_hook.py -k 'ship or execute' -x`, `pytest tests/test_command_set.py tests/test_project_setup.py -x`, `pytest tests/ -x`, `ruff check src/ tests/`, `bash -n packages/ahe-antigravity/bin/ahe-antigravity`, `bash -n packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex`, `bash -n bin/ahe`, `node --check packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/ahe-ship-pycache python3 -m py_compile packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/ship/scripts/write_plan.py`, `./init.sh`, and `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`. `mypy src/ --strict` could not run because `mypy` is not installed.

features.name: Remove .ahe Directory From AHE Contract
features.description: Remove `.ahe` as an AHE-managed workspace concept and transition the workflow-state artifact to root `status.json`.
features.evidence: Updated `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/new/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/harness/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/converse/SKILL.md`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, `src/templates/agents.md`, and focused tests `test_new_workflow.py`, `test_spec_workflow.py`, `test_session_tracking_handoff.py`, `test_clarification_prompt.py`, and `test_ahe_hook.py`. Verified with focused pytest and full suite passing.

features.name: AHE Ship Writer Uses Active Python Environment
features.description: Make the ship writer and its contract checks use the active Python environment so `ahe ship` works reliably from the `main` Conda environment instead of leaking to the system Python.
features.evidence: Updated `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/ship/scripts/write_plan.py`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/ship/SKILL.md`, and `tests/test_ahe_ship_writer.py`. Replaced the Python 3.11-only `match` parsing with straightforward conditionals, changed the ship skill example to `python`, and changed the writer test to invoke `sys.executable` instead of hardcoded `python3`. Verified with `conda run -n main pytest tests/test_ahe_antigravity_ship.py tests/test_ahe_ship_writer.py tests/test_ahe_hook.py -k 'ship or ahe_ship' -x`, `conda run -n main python -m py_compile packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/ship/scripts/write_plan.py tests/test_ahe_ship_writer.py`, and `node --check packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`.

features.name: AHE Ship Uses Gemini 3.1 Pro High In Antigravity
features.description: Make Antigravity execute saved `ahe ship` plans with the `Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)` model instead of relying on the CLI default model.
features.evidence: Updated `packages/ahe-antigravity/bin/ahe-antigravity`, `packages/ahe-antigravity/skills/ahe-ship/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/ship/SKILL.md`, `README.md`, and `docs/PRODUCT.md`. Added `tests/test_ahe_antigravity_ship.py::test_ahe_ship_runs_agy_with_gemini_model` to lock the `agy --model 'Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)'` contract. Verified with `pytest tests/test_ahe_antigravity_ship.py -x`, `pytest tests/test_ahe_hook.py -k ship -x`, `bash -n packages/ahe-antigravity/bin/ahe-antigravity`, and `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`.

features.name: AHE Doctor Expansion Plan
features.description: Expand ahe doctor to comprehensively diagnose Codex and Antigravity installations alongside a dynamic execution smoke test.
features.evidence: Updated `bin/ahe`, `packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex`, and `packages/ahe-antigravity/bin/ahe-antigravity` to expand `doctor` with static checks and dynamic smoke test for Antigravity ship execution. Added isolated tests in `tests/test_ahe_doctor.py`. Verified with `pytest tests/ -x`, `bash -n` checks, and `./init.sh`.

features.name: Simplify AHE Compress To One User Command
features.description: Replace the separate `ahe compress feature-list` and `ahe compress tests` command wording with a single `ahe compress` contract that checks both harness-file pressure and stale overlapping tests.
features.evidence: Updated `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/compress/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/think/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/harness/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex`, `README.md`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, `tests/test_ahe_hook.py`, and `tests/test_compression_workflow.py` so `ahe compress` now runs both detectors and routes follow-up work from one entrypoint. Verified with `pytest tests/test_ahe_hook.py tests/test_compression_workflow.py -x`, `node --check packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `bash -n packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex`, and `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`. `tests/test_command_set.py` still has an unrelated pre-existing `SOLVER_SKILL_MD_PATH` NameError.

features.name: Revert AHE Ship To Save-Only
features.description: Change the Codex-side `ahe ship` contract so it only writes `.plans/{plan_name}.md` and stops there, removing automatic Antigravity execution and cleanup.
features.evidence: Updated `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/ship/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `README.md`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex`, and `packages/ahe-antigravity/bin/ahe-antigravity` to remove execution semantics. Removed tests matching the old behavior. Verified via passing test suite.

features.name: Bidirectional AHE Query Command Matching
features.description: Allow thinker-routed AHE queries in both `ahe <query>` and `<query> ahe` forms, and allow independent fix-plan routing in both `ahe fix <query>` and `<query> ahe fix` forms without routing fix queries through `ahe-think`.
features.evidence: Updated `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/think/SKILL.md`, `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/fix/SKILL.md`, `README.md`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and `tests/test_ahe_hook.py` so the hook now accepts `ahe <query>`, `<query> ahe`, `ahe fix <query>`, and `<query> ahe fix` with word-boundary command matching. Verified with `pytest tests/test_ahe_hook.py -x`, `pytest tests/test_command_set.py -x`, `node --check packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, and `./init.sh`.

features.name: Align AHE Startup Contract With Think-Led Read Order
features.description: Align AHE's Codex-side startup contract so `think` is the explicit decision-maker, copied harness files are checked before reading, and the startup read order follows the user's required file sequence.
features.evidence: Canonicalized artifact names around `AGENTS.md`, `docs/product.md`, `docs/product{n}.md`, `docs/architecture.md`, `docs/instructions.md`, `init.sh`, `feature-list.json`, `status.json`, `progress.md`, and `session-handoff.md`. Updated `PROGRESS.md`, `SESSION-HANDOFF.md`, and `docs/PRODUCT.md` to lowercase in previous steps, and verified test suite completion via `./init.sh && pytest tests/ -x`.

features.name: Global-Only AHE Skill Display Cleanup
features.description: Remove stale legacy AHE skill directories during install and uninstall so Codex displays only the current global `ahe-*` skills instead of duplicate local-style and global entries.
features.evidence: Updated `packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex` to clean legacy AHE-owned skill directories such as `new`, `fix`, `ship`, `ahe-init`, and older aliases before installing current `ahe-*` global skills and during uninstall. Updated `tests/test_project_setup.py` to assert current `ahe-*` install paths and legacy cleanup. Verified with `bash -n packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex`, `pytest tests/test_project_setup.py -x`, `ruff check tests/test_project_setup.py`, an isolated `CODEX_HOME` installer smoke that listed only current `ahe-*` skills, `CODEX_HOME=/Users/KC/.codex packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex install --force`, `CODEX_HOME=/Users/KC/.codex packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex doctor`, and `./init.sh`.

features.name: Install AHE As A Global Codex Skill
features.description: Package and install a top-level global `ahe` Codex skill so the skill picker shows `ahe` as a real skill entry instead of only surfacing `bin/ahe` from the repo.
features.evidence: Added `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md`, updated `packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex`, `README.md`, `docs/product.md`, `tests/test_project_setup.py`, and `tests/test_command_set.py` so `ahe` is part of the managed global skill set and installer expectations. Verified with `bash -n packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex`, `pytest tests/test_project_setup.py tests/test_command_set.py -x`, `ruff check tests/test_project_setup.py tests/test_command_set.py`, `CODEX_HOME=/Users/KC/.codex packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex install --force`, `sed -n '1,40p' /Users/KC/.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md`, `CODEX_HOME=/Users/KC/.codex packages/ahe-codex/bin/ahe-codex doctor`, and `./init.sh`.

features.name: Add CodeGraph Preflight To All AHE Entrypoints
features.description: Make every hook-driven AHE entrypoint emit the same CodeGraph preflight instructions before normal routing.
features.evidence: Updated `packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js` to extract and prepend CodeGraph preflight instructions to all AHE entrypoints. Updated `tests/test_ahe_hook.py` to assert the preflight text across `ahe new`, `ahe ship`, `ahe fix`, and `ahe-overview`. Verified with `pytest tests/test_ahe_hook.py -x`, `node --check packages/ahe-codex/.codex/hooks/ahe-hook.js`, and `./init.sh`.

features.name: Post-Generation Harness Checker
features.description: Add post-generation harness checker to AHE bootstrap flow to validate and repair generated harness artifacts after bootstrap/initialization or harness maintenance.
features.evidence: Added `ahe-harness-checker` internal skill, integrated into `ahe-new`, `ahe-harness`, and `ahe-think` workflows, updated `ahe-hook.js`, and added corresponding tests. Rewrote `ahe-harness-checker/SKILL.md` for robustness.
